rows.protocol_note: GPT-5.6 Preview System Card dated 2026-06-25. Comparison values use recent model snapshots and may differ from launch values. The card often reports performance across reasoning-effort curves; only explicit table cells or exact prose values are normalized here. 108 ProtocolQA questions converted to open-ended short-answer; 19 PhD experts used for baseline.
